text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical Notably, the US continued to deliver munitions to RAF Fairford after the ceasefire earlier this week, and the forward-based bomber fleet is still present and armed. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043176885249507768/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 值得注意的是，本周早些时候停火后，美国继续向英国费尔福德空军基地运送弹药，且前沿部署的轰炸机编队仍然在位并处于武装状态。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043176885249507768/photo/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ The Iranian delegation left Pakistan
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗代表团已离开巴基斯坦

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：伊朗没有听从你们关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪家媒体的？记者：NBC新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: These negotiations took place after 40 days of imposed war and were conducted in an atmosphere of mistrust and suspicion; it is natural that we should not have expected to reach an agreement in just one session…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Baghaei: I thank the government and people of Pakistan, and personally Mr. Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, Mr. Asim Munir, Army Commander, and Mr. Ishaq Dar, Deputy Prime Minister. We thank them for their warm hospitality and are confident that contacts between us and Pakistan and our other friends in the region will continue. Diplomacy stands alongside the defenders of the homeland and we are ready for all kinds of sacrifices. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人：这些谈判是在40天的强加战争之后进行的，是在不信任和怀疑的氛围中进行的；我们自然不应该期望在一次会议中就达成协议……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人巴盖里：我感谢巴基斯坦政府和人民，特别感谢巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫先生、陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔先生以及副总理伊沙克·达尔先生。我们感谢他们的热情款待，并相信我们与巴基斯坦以及我们在该地区的其他朋友之间的联系将会继续。外交与保卫家园的捍卫者站在一起，我们已做好一切牺牲的准备。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei, responding to a Washington Post report: At a time when American officials accuse Iran of bad faith and blackmail, circles within US policy making and media openly call for the assassination of Iranian…" Pakistan must be on high alert and make sure the Iranian delegation returns home safely. The Wall Street Journal piece wasn't some crazy talk, it was a direct threat
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench mirror：“🇮🇷⚡️🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里回应《华盛顿邮报》报道：在美国官员指责伊朗缺乏诚意和勒索的同时，美国决策圈和媒体公开呼吁暗杀伊朗……” 巴基斯坦必须保持高度警惕，确保伊朗代表团安全回国。《华尔街日报》的文章并非疯言疯语，而是一个直接威胁

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Esmail Baghaei, following talks with the U.S.: We reached an understanding on a number of issues, but on 2-3 important topics, the views differed and ultimately the talks did not lead to an agreement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: These negotiations took place after 40 days of imposed war and were conducted in an atmosphere of mistrust and suspicion; it is natural that we should not have expected to reach an agreement in just one session from the start. No one had such an expectation either. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里在与美国会谈后表示：我们就一些问题达成了谅解，但在2-3个重要议题上，双方观点存在分歧，最终谈判未能达成协议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人：这些谈判是在40天的强加战争之后进行的，是在不信任和怀疑的氛围中进行的；从一开始，我们就自然不应该期望在一次会议中就达成协议。也没有人有这样的期望。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Pakistani Defense Minister following Islamabad talks: Several rounds of intense and constructive negotiations continued for twenty-four hours between US Vice President JD Vance and Iranian Parliament Speaker Qalibaf, mediated by Pakistan's Field Marshal Asim Munir. Pakistan expresses gratitude to both sides for appreciating its mediatory role. "We hope that the two sides continue with the positive spirit to achieve durable peace and prosperity for the entire region and beyond. It is imperative that the parties continue to uphold their commitment to ceasefire." Pakistan will continue facilitating engagement and dialogue between Iran and the United States in the days to come. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 巴基斯坦国防部长在伊斯兰堡会谈后表示：美国副总统JD·万斯与伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫在巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔的调解下，进行了长达24小时的激烈且具有建设性的谈判。巴基斯坦感谢双方对其调解作用的认可。“我们希望双方继续保持积极态度，为整个地区及更广泛地区实现持久和平与繁荣。各方必须继续履行停火承诺。” 巴基斯坦将在未来几天继续促进伊朗与美国之间的接触与对话。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷 Pakistan’s Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar issues a statement after Vice President J.D. Vance says talks between the U.S. and Iran have failed, expressing gratitude to both sides for recognizing Pakistan’s role in helping achieve the ceasefire. Dar says…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Esmail Baghaei, following talks with the U.S.: We reached an understanding on a number of issues, but on 2-3 important topics, the views differed and ultimately the talks did not lead to an agreement. @ wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷 在副总统JD·万斯表示美伊谈判失败后，巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔发表声明，感谢双方认可巴基斯坦在帮助实现停火方面的作用。达尔表示……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里在与美国会谈后表示：我们就一些问题达成了谅解，但在2-3个重要议题上，双方观点存在分歧，最终谈判未能达成协议。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on Iran wanting to controi the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：美伊双方未能达成一致的问题包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡以及浓缩铀库存。推文

text: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 The ongoing Iran-US negotiations in Pakistan ended unsuccessfully after a 21-hour active meeting. The parties failed to reach an agreement. The main reason for the disagreement was again Iran's nuclear program and the issue of opening the Strait of Hormuz. US Vice President Jade Wency states that the Iranians did not show readiness to reach an agreement, primarily on the nuclear issue. Meanwhile, the Iranian side claims that the American side's demands were excessively maximalist and unrealistic. The American delegation has already left Pakistan. It is still unknown whether military actions against Iran will resume, as a few minutes ago, Trump stated that whether or not there is an agreement, America has already won and Iran's military capabilities are completely destroyed. He also added that the Strait of Hormuz will be opened very soon. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 正在巴基斯坦进行的伊美谈判在经过21小时的积极会议后以失败告终。双方未能达成协议。分歧的主要原因再次是伊朗的核计划和霍尔木兹海峡的开放问题。美国副总统杰德·温西表示，伊朗人没有表现出达成协议的意愿，特别是在核问题上。与此同时，伊朗方面声称美国方面的要求过于极端且不切实际。美国代表团已经离开巴基斯坦。目前尚不清楚针对伊朗的军事行动是否会恢复，因为几分钟前，特朗普表示，无论是否有协议，美国都已经赢了，伊朗的军事能力已被彻底摧毁。他还补充说，霍尔木兹海峡很快就会开放。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on is Iran wanting to control the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Pakistan’s Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar issues a statement after Vice President J.D. Vance says talks between the U.S. and Iran have failed, expressing gratitude to both sides for recognizing Pakistan’s role in helping achieve the ceasefire. Dar says it is “imperative” that the ceasefire holds and urges continued engagement, adding Pakistan will keep facilitating dialogue between both sides. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 Axios：美伊双方未能达成一致的问题包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡以及浓缩铀库存。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在副总统JD·万斯表示美伊谈判失败后，巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔发表声明，感谢双方认可巴基斯坦在帮助实现停火方面的作用。达尔表示，停火必须“保持”，并敦促继续接触，补充说巴基斯坦将继续促进双方之间的对话。 @wfwitness

text: ✈️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - The US negotiators have departed Pakistan after talks with Iran fell apart.
text_zh: ✈️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - 在与伊朗的会谈破裂后，美国谈判代表已离开巴基斯坦。

text: 🎥 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - The American delegation led by Vance is departing the Serena Hotel in Islamabad for Nur Khan airbase to fly back to U.S.
text_zh: 🎥 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 - 由万斯率领的美国代表团正离开伊斯兰堡塞雷纳酒店，前往努尔汗空军基地飞回美国。

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "‘Iran has decided to reject our demands’ – J.D. VanceThis here is exactly the problem with America. They demand, they impose, they enforce. They do not ‘negotiate’. They are not a good faith actor.Iran won’t accept bullying. It will fight the Zionist-American alliance for another 10 years if it has to."
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“‘伊朗决定拒绝我们的要求’ – JD·万斯 这正是美国的问题所在。他们要求、他们强加、他们强制。他们不‘谈判’。他们不是善意的参与者。伊朗不会接受欺凌。如果有必要，它将与犹太复国主义-美国联盟再战10年。”

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Intense smoke is seen rising from Dahieh, close to Burj Al Barajneh area. The cause is not yet clear. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 可以看到浓烟从达希耶升起，靠近Burj Al Barajneh地区。原因尚不清楚。 @wfwitness

text: 🐻 Enjoy your weekend - and here's all the key news of the past 24 hours you maybe missed ➡️ Russian fighters get ready for Orthodox Easter ➡️ Sane residents of Odessa celebrate the city's liberation from the Nazis ➡️ Russia and Ukraine have carried out an exchange of prisoners of war, and Russia returned its last civilian hostages Ukrainians had kidnapped from the Kursk region ➡️ Iran and the US held negotiations in Pakistan. That went about as well as most people expected - the Iranian side called them "not merely dialogue and negotiation, but rather a demand ", and no agreement was reached , JD Vance says that the nuclear issue is the one the sides can't agree on . Here's the Iranian take on the whole thing ➡️ Netanyahu claims Israel is "strangling" Iran, Iraq, and Yemen ➡️ Trump threatens China over reports that they are supplying Iran with MANPADS 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 祝你周末愉快——以下是你可能错过的过去24小时的所有关键新闻 ➡️ 俄罗斯战士为东正教复活节做准备 ➡️ 敖德萨的理智居民庆祝城市从纳粹手中解放 ➡️ 俄罗斯和乌克兰进行了战俘交换，俄罗斯找回了乌克兰从库尔斯克地区绑架的最后几名平民人质 ➡️ 伊朗和美国在巴基斯坦举行了谈判。结果正如大多数人预期的那样——伊朗方面称其“不仅仅是对话和谈判，而是要求”，且未达成任何协议，JD·万斯表示核问题是双方无法达成一致的问题。以下是伊朗对此事的看法 ➡️ 内塔尼亚胡声称以色列正在“扼杀”伊朗、伊拉克和也门 ➡️ 特朗普就中国向伊朗提供便携式防空导弹的报道威胁中国 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Full statement from JD Vance following 21 hours of talks in Islamabad: "We have not reached an agreement, and I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States." Vance says the US made clear its red lines and what it would accommodate — Iran chose not to accept US terms. The core issue: "We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon and will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon." He claims Iran's enrichment facilities "have been destroyed" but says the US hasn't seen "a fundamental commitment of will for the Iranians not to develop a nuclear weapon, not just now, not just two years from now, but for the long term." Talks collapse. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 JD·万斯在伊斯兰堡进行21小时会谈后的完整声明：“我们没有达成协议，我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息。” 万斯表示，美国明确了其红线以及可以妥协的内容——伊朗选择不接受美国的条款。核心问题是：“我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求能够使他们迅速获得核武器的工具。” 他声称伊朗的浓缩设施“已被摧毁”，但表示美国没有看到“伊朗人不仅现在、不仅两年后，而是从长远来看不发展核武器的根本意志承诺。” 谈判破裂。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on is Iran wanting to control the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯关于美国在谈判中提出的建议：我们在此留下一个非常简单的提议。一种我们最终且最好的理解方式。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：美伊双方未能达成一致的问题包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡以及浓缩铀库存。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim: The ball is in the United States' court, and Iran is not in a hurry in the negotiations. As long as the United States does not agree to a reasonable deal, there will be no change in the situation of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：球在美方手中，伊朗在谈判中并不着急。只要美国不同意达成合理的协议，霍尔木兹海峡的局势就不会有任何改变。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Fun fact: Iranian officials, although they wear suits, never wear ties. After the Iranian revolution, ties were considered a symbol of Western cultural decline, often worn by perpetrators of colonialism and oppression. Not wearing a tie was considered a revolutionary gesture.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 有趣的事实：伊朗官员虽然穿西装，但从不打领带。伊朗革命后，领带被认为是西方文化衰落的象征，通常由殖民主义和压迫的肇事者佩戴。不打领带被视为一种革命姿态。

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 Professor Marandi, member of the Iranian delegation: ‘Obviously, the Trump regime wasn’t seriously negotiating’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 伊朗代表团成员马兰迪教授：“显然，特朗普政权并没有认真谈判” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇷 NEW: According to another informed source, one of the issues was America’s unwillingness to compel Israel to an immediate ceasefire in Lebanon The U.S. merely convinced Israel to stop strikes in Beirut while ‘gradually expanding’ to include southern Lebanon and the rest of the country. Iran did not agree to this. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：据另一位知情人士透露，问题之一是美国不愿强迫以色列在黎巴嫩立即停火。美国只是说服以色列停止对贝鲁特的袭击，同时“逐步扩大”到包括黎巴嫩南部和该国其他地区。伊朗不同意这一点。 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ❗️ Possible Israeli airstrike in Dahyeh
text_zh: ❗️ 达希耶可能发生以色列空袭

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRGC-affiliated media Tasnim News Agency says Iran tried to steer talks toward a common framework, but claims U.S. “natural greediness” prevented progress. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162857181786247/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队附属媒体塔斯尼姆通讯社称，伊朗试图将谈判引向共同框架，但声称美国的“天生贪婪”阻碍了进展。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162857181786247/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 The US Air Force Two carrying JD Vance departing Islamabad. Witkoff and Kushner are yet to depart. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162645084127270/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 搭载JD·万斯的美国空军二号离开伊斯兰堡。威特科夫和库什纳尚未离开。 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162645084127270/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 US Vice-President JD Vance about the negotiations: "The simple fact is that we need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon." https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043161037592035637/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 美国副总统JD·万斯谈及谈判：“简单的事实是，我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求能够使他们迅速获得核武器的工具。” https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043161037592035637/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel At least 6 people were shot and 1 person was killed at a Chick-fil-A in Union Township, New Jersey, officials told RLS Media. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043160711224799450/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 官员告诉RLS Media，新泽西州联合镇的一家Chick-fil-A发生枪击事件，至少6人中枪，1人死亡。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043160711224799450/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to data from MarineTraffic, there appears to have been an uptick in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz in the last 36 hours, with at least 10 ships transiting and 7 more in progress. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043158579612422558/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据MarineTraffic的数据，过去36小时内霍尔木兹海峡的交通似乎有所增加，至少有10艘船只通过，另有7艘正在通过。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043158579612422558/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 IRIB report: Twenty-one hours of intensive negotiations have ended without agreement. Such intensive negotiations are unprecedented. The Iranian side entered with clear principles and complete good faith, but with distrust based on the Americans' track record. "The atmosphere of American greed in these talks prevented them from being able to reach an agreement or reach a result or progress." The Iranian delegation's effort was to fully protect the achievements Iranians obtained in the forty-day battle while also reaching an agreement. The hardening of the negotiation process showed itself as American greed became clear. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社报道：21小时的密集谈判在没有达成协议的情况下结束。如此密集的谈判是前所未有的。伊朗方面带着明确的原则和完全的诚意进入谈判，但基于美国人的过往记录，怀有不信任感。“美国在这些谈判中的贪婪氛围阻碍了他们达成协议、取得成果或取得进展。” 伊朗代表团的努力是在充分保护伊朗人在四十天战斗中取得的成就的同时达成协议。谈判过程的僵化随着美国贪婪的显现而显现出来。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 Civilian residents who were freed from Ukrainian captivity have returned to the Kursk region, reported governor Alexander Khinshtein. The arrivals were accommodated in the Civil Defense Shelter where medical personnel are working with them. Each will be issued a regional certificate for 30,000 rubles for urgent needs, and they will also be assisted in restoring their documents and obtaining social payments, noted the governor. The Kursk residents who returned from captivity will quickly receive housing certificates, reported the head of the Sudzha district Spiridonov. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 据州长亚历山大·欣施泰因报道，从乌克兰俘虏中获释的平民已返回库尔斯克地区。抵达者被安置在民防避难所，医务人员正在那里为他们工作。州长指出，每个人都将获得一张30,000卢布的区域证书用于紧急需求，并将协助他们恢复证件和获得社会救济金。苏贾区区长斯皮里多诺夫报告称，从俘虏中返回的库尔斯克居民将很快收到住房证书。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Vance is working and the orange clown is with the Secretary of State Rubio at a UFC event
text_zh: 万斯在工作，而那个橘色小丑正和国务卿卢比奥在UFC活动现场

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ JD Vance is on his way back to the US
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ JD·万斯正在返回美国的途中

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 NEW: J.D. Vance leaves Islamabad IRIB: ‘The American enemy, which is vile, wicked and dishonest — attempted to achieve on the negotiating table what it could not achieve through war. Among these demands are handing over enriched uranium and opening the Strait of Hormuz without confirmed Iranian sovereignty over it. Iran has decided to reject these terms and continue the sacred defense of its fatherland by any means necessary, military or diplomatic. ’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 最新消息：JD·万斯离开伊斯兰堡。伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社：“卑鄙、邪恶且不诚实的美国敌人试图在谈判桌上实现其在战争中无法实现的目标。这些要求包括移交浓缩铀和在没有确认伊朗主权的情况下开放霍尔木兹海峡。伊朗已决定拒绝这些条款，并以任何必要的方式——军事或外交——继续捍卫其祖国的神圣事业。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Vice President JD Vance is now en route back to Washington following unsuccessful trilateral talks between the U.S., Pakistan, and Iran. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043155763229528461/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在美、巴、伊三方会谈失败后，美国副总统JD·万斯目前正在返回华盛顿的途中。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043155763229528461/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US negotiators have departed Pakistan after talks with Iran fell apart. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043155728215547931/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在与伊朗的会谈破裂后，美国谈判代表已离开巴基斯坦。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043155728215547931/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Per the White House press pool, U.S. Vice President JD Vance has now boarded Air Force Two and is departing Islamabad, Pakistan following unsuccessful talks between the U.S. and Iran on resolving the conflict in the Middle East. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043154752276422738/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据白宫新闻团消息，美国副总统JD·万斯已登上空军二号，离开巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，此前美伊关于解决中东冲突的会谈未能达成协议。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043154752276422738/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Despite direct support from U.S. Vice President JD Vance and the Trump Administration, almost all polls show Viktor Orbán significantly losing his upcoming bid for Prime Minister of Hungary, with traders on Polymarket pitting his chances at less than 30%. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043151495382651348/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 尽管有美国副总统JD·万斯和特朗普政府的直接支持，几乎所有民调都显示维克多·欧尔班在即将到来的匈牙利总理竞选中大幅落后，Polymarket上的交易员认为他获胜的机会不到30%。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043151495382651348/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iranian state media: Iran has no plans for the next round of talks. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗官方媒体：伊朗没有进行下一轮谈判的计划。推文

text: Open Source Intel Here is the full remarks from Vice President JD Vance, announcing that the U.S.-Iran talks ended without an agreement. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043149739672138227/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 这是副总统JD·万斯宣布美伊谈判在没有达成协议的情况下结束的完整讲话。由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043149739672138227/video/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ We leave here with a very simple proposal, a method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it" - JD Vance ⚡ The American delegation has left Islamabad. @AussieCossack
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺：“❗️ 我们在此留下一个非常简单的提议，一种我们最终且最好的理解方式。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受” - JD·万斯 ⚡ 美国代表团已离开伊斯兰堡。 @AussieCossack

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance’s remarks are over, they lasted less than 4 minutes. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance has boarded Air Force Two enroute back to Washington D.C. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯的讲话结束了，持续了不到4分钟。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯已登上空军二号，正在返回华盛顿特区的途中。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian Tasnim Report (from negotiations in Islamabad): Iranian team (led by Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf, Abbas Araqchi, and Ali Bagheri, plus experts) held nearly 21 hours of intensive talks. They firmly defended Iran's fundamental rights in political, military, and peaceful nuclear fields . Successfully blocked U.S. excessive demands, including concessions on the Strait of Hormuz and removal of nuclear materials (what the U.S. could not achieve on the battlefield). Iran proposed initiatives for a common framework, but U.S. "greedy mindset" prevented rationality and agreement.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗塔斯尼姆报道（来自伊斯兰堡谈判）：伊朗团队（由穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫、阿巴斯·阿拉格希和阿里·巴盖里以及专家组成）进行了近21小时的密集会谈。他们坚定地捍卫了伊朗在政治、军事和和平核领域的根本权利。成功阻止了美国的过度要求，包括在霍尔木兹海峡和移除核材料方面的让步（美国在战场上无法实现的目标）。伊朗提出了共同框架的倡议，但美国的“贪婪心态”阻碍了理性和协议的达成。

text: Open Source Intel Shortly after finishing speech, U.S. Vice President JD Vance left the venue. U.S. Vice President JD Vance: "The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America. So, we go back to the U.S. having not come to an agreement. They have chosen not to accept our terms." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 演讲结束后不久，美国副总统JD·万斯离开了现场。美国副总统JD·万斯：“坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息。所以，我们回到美国，没有达成协议。他们选择不接受我们的条款。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iranian state media: The Iranian team sought to push the American side toward a common framework, but the American maximalist approach prevented them from acting rationally and realistically. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗官方媒体：伊朗团队试图推动美方达成共同框架，但美国的极端主义做法阻碍了他们理性且现实地行事。推文

text: Open Source Intel JD Vance says U.S.-Iran talks end with no agreement. U.S. Vice President JD Vance: "The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America. So, we go back to the U.S. having not come to an agreement. They have chosen not to accept our terms." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel JD·万斯表示美伊谈判在没有达成协议的情况下结束。美国副总统JD·万斯：“坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息。所以，我们回到美国，没有达成协议。他们选择不接受我们的条款。” - Open Source Intel 推文
